title: Man missing after Knysna Mall visit
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna detectives are appealing to the public for assistance in locating a 46-year-old man who was reported missing on Thursday, 22 January 2026.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna detectives are appealing to the public for assistance in locating a 46-year-old man who was reported missing on Thursday, 22 January 2026."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Farrol Ritzenberg, of Essenhout Street in New Horizons, Plettenberg Bay, was last seen at the parking area of the Knysna Mall."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to reports, he had accompanied family members to a medical facility earlier that day.","html":"According to reports, he had accompanied family members to a medical facility earlier that day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"After arriving at the mall, he was left alone in a vehicle, but had disappeared by the time his family returned. A search of the surrounding area was conducted, but yielded no results.","html":"After arriving at the mall, he was left alone in a vehicle, but had disappeared by the time his family returned. A search of the surrounding area was conducted, but yielded no results."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At the time of his disappearance, Ritzenberg was wearing a red top, black jeans and blue Crocs.","html":"At the time of his disappearance, Ritzenberg was wearing a red top, black jeans and blue Crocs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The investigating officer, Warrant Officer Mario Uithaler, has urged anyone with information that may assist police in locating the missing man to come forward.","html":"The investigating officer, Warrant Officer Mario Uithaler, has urged anyone with information that may assist police in locating the missing man to come forward."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Information can be shared by contacting the investigating officer on 044 302 6652 or Crime Stop on 08600 10111.","html":"Information can be shared by contacting the investigating officer on 044 302 6652 or Crime Stop on 08600 10111."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]

images.alt: Man missing after Knysna Mall visit
